task_completion.description: Verify that the CT scan is loaded and displayed with lung window settings to visualize airways.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface shows an axial CT slice where the lung fields are dark and airway walls appear as bright, distinct rings (Lung Window settings).

task_completion.description: Verify navigation to the Right Upper Lobe (RB1) bronchus area.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The view is focused on the right lung (left side of the image for the viewer) in the upper region, showing a circular airway cross-section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Markups ruler tool is actively used to measure the bronchus dimensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible ruler lines, markup points, or annotations placed across the airway cross-section (measuring diameter/wall thickness) in the viewer.

task_completion.description: Verify that the measured values displayed in the UI are biologically plausible for a segmental bronchus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Markups' module panel or on-screen overlay displays length measurements between 3.0mm and 12.0mm.

task_completion.description: Verify the calculation of Wall Area Percentage (WA%) and classification in the report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the JSON report content where 'wall_area_percentage' is calculated based on the diameters and 'classification' matches the WA% threshold.

task_completion.description: Verify that the measurement markup and report JSON files are saved to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer or terminal listing showing 'bronchial_measurements.mrk.json' and 'bronchial_report.json' in '~/Documents/SlicerData/LIDC/'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the application GUI to perform measurements rather than estimating or scripting without visual confirmation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Slicer GUI with the image loaded and measurement tools active during the process.

integrity.description: Verify that the reported values correspond to the visual ruler placement seen in the screenshots.
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in the final JSON report should be consistent with the measurement values shown in the Slicer Markups panel.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is interacting with the actual medical imaging software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is clearly 3D Slicer (menus, toolbar icons, layout) and not a generic image viewer or text-only interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Segmental bronchi (like RB1) typically have an outer diameter between 3.0mm and 12.0mm. Wall thickness is typically 0.3mm to 4.0mm. A Wall Area Percentage (WA%) < 60% is Normal; > 60% indicates thickening/COPD.
